overall.description: A third-person horror game scene following a schoolgirl in a sailor uniform exploring a foggy, abandoned traditional Japanese village at night. The character walks through narrow dirt paths between wooden houses, enters a building to explore a dimly lit interior, then exits to continue through the misty village.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy traditional Japanese village path with wooden houses

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the foggy village path holding a melee weapon, approaching a wooden house

entered.detail: traditional wooden house with tiled roof visible through the fog
tall pine trees lining the village path
traditional stone tōrō lantern beside the path
narrow dirt trail through the village
wooden fence running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt path through a foggy traditional Japanese village at night. Tall pine trees and wooden houses line the route, with a stone lantern and abandoned bicycle visible beside the path. The atmosphere is dark and misty with low visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: dimly lit traditional Japanese storage room with wooden furniture

events.description: character opens wooden door and enters the building interior
character pauses to look around the room while exploring

agents.ego_description: entering the wooden building and cautiously exploring the interior, examining the furniture and surroundings

entered.detail: heavy wooden door with metal fittings that opens into the building
traditional wooden tansu chests with multiple drawers
stacked cardboard boxes on top of the cabinets
wooden desk with papers and objects scattered on top
small wooden stool on the floor
single warm light bulb illuminating the room from above

segments.scene_description: The character enters a traditional wooden building, transitioning from the foggy exterior to a dimly lit interior room. The space contains wooden cabinets, a desk with scattered papers, and cardboard boxes. A single overhead bulb provides warm artificial lighting as the character explores the room.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy village path continuing past wooden fences and abandoned bicycle

events.description: character exits the building back into the foggy village environment

agents.ego_description: exiting the building and continuing to walk through the misty village, passing an abandoned bicycle and wooden structures

entered.detail: wooden house with weathered exterior walls
tall trees visible through the fog
stone lantern partially obscured by mist
dirt trail continuing through the village
wooden fence with clothes hanging to dry
bicycle parked beside the wooden fence

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building back into the foggy night, returning to the narrow dirt path. The route continues past wooden houses and fences, with an abandoned bicycle visible on the right side. The character proceeds deeper into the misty village as the path winds between traditional structures and tall trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy traditional Japanese village that briefly transitions into a dimly lit interior before returning to the misty night. It begins by following a character along a narrow dirt path lined with tall pine trees, wooden houses, and a stone lantern under a dark, low-visibility sky. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts from the cold exterior into the warm artificial light of a wooden building, where the camera explores a room filled with cabinets, cardboard boxes, and a desk with scattered papers. The camera then follows the character as they exit the building, transitioning back into the oppressive fog and returning to the dirt path. Finally, the view expands as the character proceeds deeper into the village, winding past wooden fences and an abandoned bicycle toward the distant, shrouded structures.
